problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: Combining Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
